chapter_title.ar: بَابُ مَنِ ادَّعَى الْإِمَامَةَ وَ لَيْسَ لَهَا بِأَهْلٍ وَ مَنْ جَحَدَ الْأَئِمَّةَ أَوْ بَعْضَهُمْ وَ مَنْ أَثْبَتَ الْإِمَامَةَ لِمَنْ لَيْسَ لَهَا بِأَهْلٍ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 85 – The one who claims the Imamate and he is not rightful for it, and the one who denies the Imams<sup>asws</sup>, or some of them<sup>asws</sup>, and the one who affirms the Imamate for the one who is not rightful for it

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ( ) - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/194)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ( ) - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/194)
text: مَنْ أَشْرَكَ مَعَ إِمَامٍ إِمَامَتُهُ مِنْ عِنْدِ اللَّهِ مَنْ لَيْسَتْ إِمَامَتُهُ مِنَ اللَّهِ كَانَ مُشْرِكاً بِاللَّهِ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Muhammad Bin Al Husayn, from Muhammad Bin Sinan, from Talha Bin Zayd,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The one who associates with an Imam<sup>asws</sup> in his<sup>asws</sup> Imamate from the Presence of Allah<sup>azwj</sup>, the one whose Imamate isn’t from Allah<sup>azwj</sup>, would be an associater (Mushrik) with Allah<sup>azwj</sup>’.
en.sarwar: 6. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Muhammad ibn al-Hassan from Muhammad ibn Sinan from Talha ibn Yazid from abu ‘Abdallah (a.s.) who has said the following. “Whoever would share the leadership of a Lead with Divine Authority without Divine authority is a polytheist.”
